place: Jl. Karma Kandara, Ungasan, Kuta Selatan, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Cloud Nine Ungasan — Clifftop Wellness Villa, Uluwatu
blurb: A newly built five-bedroom clifftop villa high on the Bukit Peninsula in Ungasan — three floors linked by a private glass elevator, a 20-metre pool, a sauna-and-ice-bath pavilion, rooftop hot tub, gym and yoga deck, fully staffed with a private chef and butlers.
detail:
Perched high on the cliffs of Uluwatu in Ungasan, Cloud Nine Ungasan is a newly built, fully-staffed five-bedroom villa designed for up to ten guests — a refuge where the stay itself becomes the destination. Set across 1,600 m² of lush hillside at the southernmost point of the Bukit Peninsula, it offers a quieter side of Bali while staying close to the island's best-known spots: Melasti Beach is nearby, Garuda Wisnu Kencana is 5.8 km away, and Uluwatu Temple a 9 km drive.

Spread across three floors and connected by a private glass elevator, the villa is built to give groups room to gather and room to breathe. Wellness is taken seriously: a 20-metre pool, a private sauna and ice-bath pavilion, a massage room, an air-conditioned gym, and an open-air yoga and meditation deck. Open-plan living and dining areas balance high ceilings, cool interiors and easy indoor-outdoor flow, with details that nod to local tradition — a Ramayana carving and a thatched-roof wellness pavilion.

For social moments, there's an indoor bar, a projector and retractable screen, a billiards table, a pizza oven and a wood-fired BBQ grill. The five en-suite bedrooms include a ground-floor king suite with terrace and swing chairs over the pool, three guest bedrooms on the second floor, and a top-floor primary with a private balcony and outdoor hot tub. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef, gardeners and butlers, Cloud Nine can also host private celebrations for up to 50 guests.
